home.description_1: I'm an IT Engineer passionate about building robust and well-designed systems. With over 5 years of experience, I've worked on scalable APIs, mobile apps, DevOps infrastructure, and AI computer vision solutions.
home.description_2: I'm driven by technological curiosity and the conviction that clean, well-structured code directly impacts product quality. I currently work at Acatha S.A., building electronic invoicing modules and mobile apps with React Native.
home.description_3: Outside of work, I manage personal servers (homelab), contribute to open source projects, and always have something new to learn.

portfolio.title: Projects
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of projects where I've applied my knowledge in development, infrastructure and automation. Each one solves a real problem.
